title: Drum Island Opens Fire
description: On pages 1–4, drum island opens fire as the Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life.
scene: Drum Island Opens Fire. The Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: you think if we dumped a bucket of water on her,

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Damn it... the sun's already going down for the day, VIVI.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: right... I guess we better drop the anchor for the night then.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Without Nami's navigational sense, sailing in the night is too dangerous...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It'll be a full moon soon...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I still want to know what the hell all that was about...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You know, those guys from yesterday. I mean, I've never even heard of a pirate called Wapol,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But he had a ship that no mere no-name pirate could get!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: whatever, don't pay any mind to him anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: This is extremely bad! His majesty was flung into the ocean!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: CRAAAAAAAAP! And he can't swim either!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: If we don't go rescue him, he'll drown for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And as for you scum! We'll have our revenge one day!

summary: This part centers on drum island opens fire, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
